demo.banner: Demo mode — no real SMS or payments will be sent

safety.title: Safety-first
safety.body: Hard-coded red flags override every agent. A tow is dispatched the instant a critical signal appears.

explainable.title: Explainable
explainable.body: Every recommendation carries a plain-language rationale you can read, audit, and override.

transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.body: You see what the system sees: sensor state, wellbeing score, and the dispatch trade-offs — always.

quickLinks.title: What can we do for you today?

book.title: Book a service
book.body: Four short steps with an autonomous concierge at the end.

voice.title: Talk to us
voice.body: Describe the problem with your voice. We listen, you confirm.

photo.title: Show us
photo.body: Upload a dashcam or instrument cluster photo for instant analysis.

noise.title: Record a noise
noise.body: Engine, brakes, or drivetrain — we classify the sound.

help.title: Help centre
help.body: Ten plain-language articles, searchable on the page.

book.title: Book a service visit
book.subtitle: Four short steps. We confirm only what we can honour.

progress.label: Progress
progress.failed: Something failed — see the error below

errors.otpRequired: Enter the code we just sent you
errors.vehicleRequired: Decode a VIN or fill the manual fields first
errors.canDriveRequired: Tell us whether the vehicle is safe to drive
errors.symptomsRequired: Describe the symptoms in a few words

step2.title: Identify your vehicle
step2.manual: I do not have a VIN — enter manually

step3.title: What is happening?
step3.canDriveLabel: Can you drive the vehicle safely right now?
step3.redFlagsLabel: Any of these happening right now?

redFlags.fluid-puddle-large: Large fluid puddle under the car
redFlags.driver-reports-unsafe: I feel the vehicle is unsafe

voice.title: Tell us what is happening
voice.subtitle: Press the button, describe the problem, then confirm or edit the transcript.
voice.transcriptPlaceholder: Your transcript will appear here. You can edit it before submitting.

tips.environment: Roll the windows up if the engine is running.
tips.bargein: Speak again to interrupt our reply.
tips.edit: You can correct the transcript before sending.

photo.title: Show us the dashboard or the damage
photo.subtitle: Capture from your camera or upload a saved image. EXIF metadata is stripped on your device.

options.title: Options
options.privacy: We strip EXIF metadata in your browser before upload, blur faces and license plates on your device, compress under 1 MiB, and never store the raw camera frame.

redaction.summary: On-device redaction: {faces} face(s), {plates} plate(s) blurred in {ms} ms.

state.analysingBody: We compare against known patterns and reply with what we see.
state.redactingBody: Faces and license plates are blurred before the photo leaves your phone.
state.redactionRequired: On-device redaction must finish before upload.

noise.title: Record an engine, brake, or drivetrain noise
noise.subtitle: We compute a mel-spectrogram on your device and classify it on the server.

options.title: Options
options.label: What kind of noise
options.tip: Hold the microphone close to the source and avoid wind.

state.classifyingBody: We compare against a labelled reference library.

status.title: Booking {id}
status.waiting: Technician Ravi is finishing a brake reseal. 22 minutes to you.
status.override: Switch to a nearby center instead

autonomy.title: Vehicle {id}
autonomy.subtitle: Sensors, PHM, and command-grant state at a glance.

revoked.title: Grant revoked
revoked.body: The vehicle returns to manual control on the next heartbeat.

consent.title: Your consents
consent.subtitle: Granular, unbundled, revocable. Each purpose has its own toggle.
consent.staleBanner: {count} of your consents are on an older notice version. Please review and re-confirm.

service-fulfilment.en: Process data to fulfil the service booking
service-fulfilment.hi: सेवा बुकिंग पूरी करने के लिए डेटा का उपयोग

diagnostic-telemetry.en: Ingest diagnostic telemetry from the vehicle

voice-photo-processing.en: Process voice and photo uploads for diagnosis
voice-photo-processing.hi: निदान के लिए आवाज़ और फोटो का उपयोग

marketing.hi: नई सेवाओं के बारे में मार्केटिंग संदेश

ml-improvement-anonymised.en: Use anonymised data to improve our models

autonomy-delegation.en: Delegate autonomous handoff within my cap
autonomy-delegation.hi: मेरी सीमा तक स्वायत्त हैंडऑफ़ की अनुमति

autopay-within-cap.en: Auto-pay within the cap I set

help.title: How can we help?
help.subtitle: Search ten short articles or browse the index. No server roundtrip — search is local.

search.label: Search the help centre
search.hint: Type at least three letters. Results update as you type.
search.noResultsBody: We did not find anything for ‘{query}’. Try a different word, or browse the article index.

offline.title: You are offline
offline.body: Your phone says the network is unreachable. Cached pages still work and any changes you make will sync when you are back online.

points.cached: Pages you visited recently are still readable.
points.queued: Form submissions are queued and replayed automatically.

safety.towRequired: We will not let you drive this vehicle. A tow is on the way.
safety.takeoverRequired: Please take control in the next 5 seconds.

region.title: Where your data lives
region.subtitle: Your bookings, telemetry, and consent records are pinned to one regional data plane. We never copy them across borders.
region.switchOk: You have no pending bookings, so you can switch.
region.switchBlockedHint: You have {count} pending booking(s). Finish or cancel them before switching region.
region.residencyBody: India users stay on asia-south1 to meet DPDP residency rules. US users stay on us-central1. Switching means a fresh start in the other plane — your records do not migrate.

errors.switchBlocked: We cannot switch region while a booking is in progress.

reason.explicit-header: You set this region with an explicit override.
reason.cookie: We remembered your last choice from a cookie.
reason.geo: We detected this from your network location.
reason.fallback: We are using the default region for this server.

demoCarla.title: Autonomous service loop, end to end
demoCarla.subtitle: Failure detected. Booking opened. Vehicle drives itself to the service centre, gets serviced, comes home — all under signed grants.

concierge.title: Autonomous concierge
concierge.subtitle: The supervisor is running your safety, wellbeing, and dispatch checks. Every tool call is verified before it runs.

rows.toolCallBody: Supervisor is requesting a validated tool invocation.
